description: Stable SHA-256[:16] hashes of the PNG/SVG images bundled with the s3Dgraphy yEd palette, indexed by the node type they represent. The hash is computed on the y:Resource payload after stripping all whitespace. Entries are used by the GraphML importer as the primary (strong) signal to identify image-based paradata nodes (AuthorNode, AuthorAINode, LicenseNode, EmbargoNode, ...). Fallbacks: yEd node type + label prefix; explicit _s3d_node_type marker in the node description.
_hash_note: Hashes are SHA-256[:16] of the y:Resource payload AFTER XML entity decoding (as performed by ElementTree) and whitespace stripping. ASCII-only bytes are hashed (encode with errors='ignore').

c7ad497cfe418537.notes: Author AI icon — Templu Mare palette, April 2026.

cbee5ca1a5c22485.notes: Author (human) icon — Templu Mare palette, April 2026.
